title: Vanilla Knives
description: A vanilla friendly mod made in Mcreator
body:
A thuroughly tested and buggless simple and fun knife mod. the attack damage is slightly less than a sword but the attack speed is 1.8 (faster cooldown).

I made this mod because there where no good 1.20.1 forge knife mods so i made one!

works well with: [https://modrinth.com/mod/weaponworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/weaponworks)

also works well with: [https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)

And:[https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)
